name: Two-time
description:
2 timbs sits on your face. Can’t breathe? Sounds like a skill issue. Dead dove because your tied up and you don’t really get a choice

They’re afab in this one! Maybe I’ll make an amab version if this pops off or something

I have this inside joke with my friends where we just horribly mess up their names. I think my favorite was twin towers though

I have very good news for anyone who cares, the bean series is NOT discontinued just because I no longer do phighting bots! I want to make a plumkid(?) bot eventually and that’s sort of like a bean to me

Requests are: Open
